mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.alert_stock_yn AS alertStockYn, u.alert_expiry_yn AS alertExpiryYn, u.alert_order_yn AS alertOrderYn, s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, -- 👤 실제 사업자 대표자명 (인증용) s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2,
-- 🎯 [우주 치트키] 가게 사진 파일명들을 콤마(,)로 묶어서 하나의 문자열로 뽑아내네! -- board_seq가 s.store_seq와 같은 사진만 가져오도록 정교하게 수정함 (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(f.sysname ORDER BY f.files_seq ASC) FROM files f WHERE f.user_seq = u.user_seq AND f.board_seq = s.store_seq AND f.file_category = 'STORE_IMAGE') AS profileImageUrl
FROM users u LEFT JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE u.user_seq = #{user_seq} AND u.user_type = 'BUSINESS'
AND s.store_seq = #{storeSeq}
-- 💡 특정 매장이 지정되지 않으면 가장 먼저 등록된 매장을 보여줌 ORDER BY s.store_seq ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, -- 👤 rep_name에서 ceo_name으로 정확히 수정 (500 에러 해결) s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.address1, s.address2, -- 첫 번째 사진만 대표 이미지로 가져오기 (SELECT sysname FROM files WHERE user_seq = s.user_seq AND board_seq = s.store_seq AND file_category = 'STORE_IMAGE' LIMIT 1) AS profileImageUrl FROM stores s WHERE s.user_seq = #{user_seq} ORDER BY s.store_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores ( user_seq, biz_number, company_name, ceo_name, opening_date, zonecode, address1, address2 ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{b_no}, #{b_nm}, #{p_nm}, #{start_dt}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2} )
mapper.select: SELECT setting_seq AS settingSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, notification_type AS notificationType, channel_type AS channelType, is_enabled AS isEnabled FROM user_notification_settings WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification_settings ( store_seq, notification_type, channel_type, is_enabled ) VALUES ( #{storeSeq}, #{notificationType}, #{channelType}, #{isEnabled} )
